title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security. Click 'Reset Password', enter your email, and follow the verification link.

title: Update Email Address
content: Users can update their email address from Profile Settings. A verification email will be sent to confirm the new email.

title: Delete Account
content: Users can permanently delete their account from Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. This action cannot be undone.

title: Change Username
content: Users can change their username from the Profile section. Usernames can only be changed once every 30 days.

title: Enable Two Factor Authentication
content: Two factor authentication can be enabled from Settings > Security. Users must verify their phone number or authentication app.

title: Recover Locked Account
content: If an account is locked due to multiple failed login attempts, users must wait 15 minutes or reset their password.

title: Update Profile Information
content: Users can update profile information such as name, bio, and profile picture from the Profile Settings page.

title: Manage Notification Preferences
content: Users can control email and push notifications from Settings > Notifications and choose which alerts they want to receive.

title: Subscription Management
content: Users can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel their subscription from the Billing section in Account Settings.

title: Contact Customer Support
content: Users can contact customer support through the Help Center or by submitting a support ticket from the Support page.
